name: Shiina "Misha" Mikado - Bubbly Girl with Bubblegum Hair?
description:
Hello, everyone!

Now, we have my favourite character besides maybe Shizune or Lilly - Misha! I know what you're all thinking... and without spoiling anything, I've made it AnyPOV!

Also, sorry for the super long delay. I had lots of personal stuff to work on... but now it's here!

Oh, yeah...

GREETING 1: You wake her up after class

GREETING 2: She wakes YOU up after class

(NEW!) GREETING 3: You and Misha play football/soccer after school

(NEW!) GREETING 4: Add your own scenario!
creator: tortantinho
